interpretation.precision_at_1: The top-ranked retrieved document was relevant for 57 of 74 benchmark questions.
interpretation.precision_at_5: Relevance was diluted across the top five results, exposing the risk of treating all retrieved context as equally authoritative.
interpretation.irrelevant_context_rate: A subset of evaluated context was irrelevant and required downstream filtering or abstention behavior.
interpretation.edge_case_abstention_rate: The system abstained correctly on 15 of 16 designated edge cases.

primary_finding: Similarity scores were not sufficient safety gates; independent checks were needed for semantic support, authority, live-state dependency, and policy compatibility.
limitations: Dataset was project-specific and relatively small.
Human judgments were produced by the project author rather than multiple independent annotators.
Precision metrics measured retrieval relevance, not complete answer quality.
Benchmark focused on retrieval and decision support rather than end-to-end production execution.
